subcodes.first_line: The hidden and concealed treasure hath appeared before all faces, crying out and proclaiming: "The Promised One hath come with sovereignty!" [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد ظهر الکنز المخزون و المکنون امام الوجوه ینادی و یقول قد اتی الموعود بسلطان
subcodes.subjects: @station of the Manifestation of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @power of the Manifestation of God, @the concourse on high
